◎简　　介  

　　Detective Sam Dietz (Leo Rossi) yet again must find and stop another serial killer who kills a number of women in ritualistic executions. Detective work for Dietz is tough having to juggle two gorgeous women one of them his new female partner Jessica (Colleen Coffey), and the other a psychiatrist Sara Lee Jaffee (Famke Janssen) who holds the key to the case.
